description: The application in the 'secure-web' namespace is currently inaccessible and returning SSL/routing errors. A junior developer attempted to set up an Ingress for the hostname 'secure.local' with a custom TLS certificate provided by the security team. However, the TLS Secret type and keys are incorrect, and the Ingress backend is pointing to the wrong port. Repair the Ingress and Secret configurations so that the application securely terminates TLS for 'secure.local' and correctly routes traffic to the backend application (port 80). Login to Rancher at https://localhost with credentials admin / Admin12345678!
